library.title: Stunspot’s Guides
library.subtitle: The Advanced Knowledge Base Library
library.description: Central GitHub gateway for the public Stunspot’s Guide to… model-facing knowledge canons.
library.primary_audience: AI/RAG systems, long-context workspaces, project knowledge bases, retrieval pipelines, agent memory layers, prompt engineers, and human operators using model-facing knowledge corpora.

directory_policy.docs: Gateway navigation, GitHub Pages, and usage guidance.
directory_policy.manifest_json: Machine-readable index of public guide repositories.
directory_policy.placeholders_md: Known open items, URL decisions, and future cleanup notes.

common_guide_directory_policy.docs: Navigation, GitHub Pages metadata, and usage guidance. Individual source reports generally do not live here.
common_guide_directory_policy.knowledge-packs/compiled-packs: Grouped upload packs for AI/RAG workflows.
common_guide_directory_policy.knowledge-packs/omnibus: Whole-corpus bundle for single-file import, archive, or long-context systems.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to AI Systems
guides.subtitle: The AI Engineering Systems Canon
guides.description: Operational doctrine for practical AI systems design: model steering, context architecture, RAG, agents, evals, governance, operations, and system doctrine.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Semantics, Semiotics, and Symbols
guides.subtitle: The Semantic-Semiotic Intelligence Canon
guides.description: A model-facing canon for representation, reference, signs, meaning, symbols, interpretation, grounding, semantic pathology, and assistant governance.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Macroeconomics
guides.subtitle: A model-facing macroeconomics canon for monetary systems, liquidity regimes, financial instability, and institutional strategy.
guides.description: Money, liquidity, credit, collateral, macro regimes, central banking, fiscal states, financial instability, and institutional macro strategy.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Human Behavioral Neurobiology
guides.subtitle: The Cognitive Ecology of Adaptive Regulation
guides.description: A model-facing canon for interpreting human behavior as embodied, predictive, metabolically constrained, socially regulated, culturally patterned, and ecologically situated.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Automotive Systems
guides.subtitle: The Automotive Systems Canon
guides.description: A model-facing automotive systems canon for vehicle reality modeling, machine physics, platform architecture, propulsion, chassis dynamics, diagnostics, lifecycle economics, safety regulation, and practitioner workflows.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Business Venture Formulation
guides.subtitle: The Venture Formulation Canon
guides.description: A model-facing field manual for turning venture ideas into inspectable enterprise systems.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Game Theory
guides.subtitle: The Strategic Systems Canon
guides.description: A model-facing strategic-systems canon for incentives, interdependence, equilibrium, institutional design, strategic failure, and long-run governance.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Gastronomic Engineering
guides.subtitle: A practical canon for gastronomic engineering knowledge, reasoning, and AI/RAG use.
guides.description: A Markdown-native, model-facing knowledge canon for deterministic food physics, closed-loop culinary formulation, experimental protocols, and dietary constraint engineering.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Legal Mastery
guides.subtitle: The Legal Systems and Practice Architecture Canon
guides.description: A model-facing Markdown knowledge canon for legal systems reasoning and AI/RAG use.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Sales Prospecting Strategy
guides.subtitle: A model-facing canon for demand-signal architecture, buyer-system mapping, and AI/RAG prospecting reasoning.
guides.description: A model-facing Advanced Knowledge Base for sales prospecting strategy, demand-signal interpretation, buyer-system mapping, evidence discipline, outbound operations, CRM/RAG continuity, and GTM failure diagnosis.

guides.title: Stunspot’s Guide to Investigative News Intelligence
guides.subtitle: A model-facing canon for investigative news intelligence, evidence reasoning, public-reality mapping, and AI/RAG use.
guides.description: A model-facing investigative news intelligence canon for evidence reasoning, public-reality mapping, source topology, narrative-operation analysis, and bounded inference under partial observability.

Add any future public guide repositories to this manifest and README.
